LEMON KIWI
--------------------
Created by: Pyro Kinetic
Version: 1.0

HOW TO PLAY:
- Arrow Keys: Move
- Space: Jump
- Goal: Eat all the fruit to unlock the next level!

INSTALLATION:
No install needed! Just double-click "Lemon Kiwi.exe" to play.
If your antivirus flags it, don't worry—it's just because I'm an indie dev without a digital certificate. 

Enjoy the game!
